title: trichoneura ciliata
intro: Trichoneura ciliata, also known as the "hairy fern", is a type of vascular plant species belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trichoneura ciliata include its potential to treat various conditions such as arthritis, fever, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Trichoneura ciliata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
